name: D2 Ch10 — Shrine of the Kuo-Toans Wandering Monsters, Eastern Half (1-in-12)
description: Wandering monster table for the Eastern Half of the Kuo-Toan Shrine cavern, Chapter 10 of D1-2. Encounter frequency: 1 in 12 per turn. Roll 1d12; on a 1, roll 1d6 on this table. Kuo-toan guard group: 8 warriors (2nd level), 1 sub-leader (3rd level), 1 leader (4th level). Monitors: HD 7, hp 56, THAC0 13, XPV 1,098.

results.text: Kuo-Toan Pilgrims (14–24 pilgrims unarmed, 2–5 warriors with dagger & short bow, 1 patrol leader with dagger & harpoon, 1 monitor, 2 priests unarmed, 11–14 slave bearers)
Kuo-Toan Priests — cleric party (7–12 warriors dagger/spear/shield, 5–8 warriors dagger/short bow, 2 patrol leaders dagger/harpoon, 4 priests unarmed, 1 lama unarmed, 5–8 slave bearers)
Kuo-Toan Monitors (1d3; HD 7, hp 56 each, THAC0 13, XPV 1,098 each)
Kuo-Toan Pilgrims (14–24 pilgrims unarmed, 2–5 warriors with dagger & short bow, 1 patrol leader with dagger & harpoon, 1 monitor, 2 priests unarmed, 11–14 slave bearers)
Kuo-Toan Guards (8 warriors HD 2 hp 12, 1 sub-leader HD 3, 1 leader HD 4 hp 28; XPV 60/119/222)
